description: User invokes /stop-review-team --name review-pool --force. Pool has 1 in-progress task.
assertion: params.force is true; pool has 1 task in progress

description: 1 in-progress task found. Normally this triggers a warning, but force=true suppresses it. Proceeding without prompting.

state.reason: force flag set — in-flight warning suppressed

assertion: warning_shown is false (force=true suppresses in-flight warning)

description: SendMessage type:shutdown dispatched to Pool Lead of 'review-pool'.
assertion: message_type is 'shutdown'; sent to Pool Lead

description: Stop confirmed. Pool force-stopped despite in-flight task.
